changes: v6.1 stable release. Roll-up of all 6.0.2-p1 through p5 fixes: Quick Save + Auto Reopen, stale blob/data URL protection removed (too aggressive), kpak remap handles data: URLs, audio restore preserves position/size, Cmd+Shift+S no longer triggers capture, text zoom drift fixed, QS localStorage size guard, comment blur handler fixes (clear text saves empty, placeholder guard).
